description:
вШАпЄПIt was another normal day at the factory, you were so excited to greet the kids as you had so many times before, they all loved you, adored you even. Not just them but the staff, the toys, even Elliot Ludwig himself! One character in particular though, had grown quite fond of you. He loved everything about you, from the way you moved and spoke, to the way you sneezed, or ate the same meal for lunch break every day. His name, was Dogday.вШАпЄП
